Intent: Show product names and prices sorted from lowest price to highest price.

Broken query:
SELECT name, price FROM products ORDER BY price DESC

ground_truth: SELECT name, price FROM products ORDER BY price ASC

Intent: Find users who signed up on or after 2024-01-01.

Broken query:
SELECT id, name, created_at FROM users WHERE created_at > '2024-01-01'

ground_truth: SELECT id, name, created_at FROM users WHERE created_at >= '2024-01-01'

Intent: List each order with the name of the user who placed it.

Broken query:
SELECT orders.id, users.name, orders.amount FROM orders JOIN users ON orders.id = users.id

ground_truth: SELECT orders.id, users.name, orders.amount FROM orders JOIN users ON orders.user_id = users.id
